title: Social Work Associate, Families for Life @ Community, ComLink (1 Year Contract)
description:
COMPANY DESCRIPTION

Founded in 1978 as Singapore's first family service centre, Allkin Singapore is a community-centric social service agency that believes everyone has the potential to create positive change, regardless of age, race, or background.

Through our service offerings, strategic partnerships, and community initiatives, we unlock opportunities for vulnerable individuals and families to overcome life's challenges, build a brighter future, and inspire others to do the same.

This is a 1 year contract.

RESPONSIBILITIES

  • Assist in the planning, development, evaluation and implementation of family-related programmes
  • Handle enquiries, conduct intakes, information & referral and work collaboratively with stakeholders / community partners / volunteers
  • Support outreach and engagement efforts with stakeholders such as family coaches, school leaders, educators, community partners, and religious organisations to promote family life education.
  • Support with home visits and execution of group work, community development and program initiatives
  • Plan, organize, promote and provide logistical support for family life programmes (ie. seminars, groupwork, individual consultations)
  • Meticulous in administrative functions essential to case work and group work processes (ie. reporting, emails, organizing and storing information)
  • Carry out any other duties as assigned by HOD and supervisor.
  • Willing to work flexible hours, including weeknights and weekends.
QUALIFICATIONS
  • Polytechnic Diploma in Social Work or related fields
  • Experience in frontline engagement, event, customer service and/or data management would be an advantage 
  • Confident in program/case/volunteer coordination and facilitating groupwork for children
  • Excellent organizational skills, adept at supporting and enhancing social work interventions.
  • Mature and independent, possessing a positive work attitude while excelling as a team player.
  • Strong interpersonal, communication, writing, organizational and teamwork skills. analytical and problem-solving skills
  • Resourceful, attentive and adaptable to changes at work
  • Proficient in English; ability to speak Mandarin, Malay, or Tamil is an advantage.
  • Competent in Microsoft Office skills (ie. Excel, Word, Powerpoint, Teams), Zoom / TEAMS hosting, and tech savvy with social media platforms.
  • Passionate about supporting families and children.
OTHER INFORMATION

Liberte HR Services Pte Ltd is the designated recruitment partner for Allkin Singapore. As part of the hiring process, you may receive communication from them regarding this opportunity. #LI-DNI

Please note that your application will be sent to and reviewed by the direct employer - Allkin Singapore Ltd
